intro: An elderly researcher in a lab coat waves you over, a stack of jumbled notes in hand.
speaker: Professor Oak
introDialogue: Ah, perfect timing! My Pokédex entries got all jumbled up and I can't tell which is which.$If you can match these four descriptions to the right Pokémon, I'll reward you with something rather special. Will you help an old professor out?
title: The Scrambled Pokédex
description: Professor Oak shows you four Pokédex entries and asks you to name each one from four choices. Match all four correctly to earn the Damage Calculator. A couple right earns a small token; help is its own reward either way.

1.label: Help the Professor
1.tooltip:
(+) Name 4 dex entries
(+) All 4 right -> unlock the Damage Calculator
1.selected: The Professor beams and lays out the first entry.

2.label: Not now
2.selected: You wish the Professor luck and move on.
